datasets.recommendation: Use for faster LoRA training and iteration.

sample_examples.prompt: Buat mind map tentang Strategi Belajar AI. Untuk mahasiswa baru. Fokus pada pemahaman dasar. Gunakan struktur ringkas. Buat untuk demo tugas akhir.
sample_examples.completion:
mindmap
  root((Strategi Belajar AI))
    Dasar AI
      Machine Learning
      Deep Learning
        Contoh
    Praktik
      Eksperimen Model
      Evaluasi
      Proyek Kecil
    Tools
      Library AI
      Python
    Konteks
      Audiens Mahasiswa Baru
      Fokus Pemahaman Dasar

sample_examples.prompt: Generate a Mermaid mindmap for Software Engineering. For first-year students. Focus on basic understanding.
sample_examples.completion:
mindmap
  root((Software Engineering))
    Design
      APIs
      Database
      Architecture
    Implementation
      Version Control
      Coding
    Testing
      Unit Tests
      Integration
      Regression
    Release
      Monitoring
      Rollback
    Context
      Audience First-Year Students
      Focus Basic Understanding

datasets.recommendation: Use for faster LoRA training and iteration.

sample_examples.prompt: Buat diagram Venn tentang Instagram, dan TikTok. Untuk mahasiswa baru. Fokus pada pemahaman dasar. Gunakan label overlap singkat. Cocok untuk presentasi kelas.
sample_examples.completion:
venn
  set A["Instagram"]
  set B["TikTok"]
  union A,B
    text "Interaksi Audiens for Pemahaman Dasar"

sample_examples.prompt: Compare Students, Workers, and Entrepreneurs using a Venn diagram. For first-year students. Focus on basic understanding.
sample_examples.completion:
venn
  set A["Students"]
  set B["Workers"]
  set C["Entrepreneurs"]
  union A,B
    text "Student Founders for Basic Understanding"
  union A,C
    text "Side Business for First-Year Students"
  union B,C
    text "Career Growth for Basic Understanding"
  union A,B,C
    text "Working Students for First-Year Students"
